headline: These 2 Stocks Called Best Way To Play Industrial Automation Trend
summary: As the industrial automation trend continues, the best near-term plays for investors are in machine vision, an analyst says.

headline: Rockwell Automation (ROK): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: Over the past six months, Rockwell Automation has been a great trade, beating the S&P 500 by 15.3%. Its stock price has climbed to $493.30, representing a healthy 23.8% increase. This was partly due to its solid quarterly results, and the performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
